creator: sc@users.realnet.ru
text:
After upgrading to Gnome 2.16 (using portupgrade) the screensaver refuses the correct passwrd with the following line in the /var/log/messages:
gnome-screensaver-dialog: in _openpam_check_error_code(): 
pam_sm_authenticate(): unexpected return value 27

The same problem is described in http://mail-index.netbsd.org/pkgsrc-bugs/2006/09/30/0013.html

How-To-Repeat: Upgrade to Gnome 2.16 and start the screensaver
